title: Megamobs
description: An origins addon that creates the chance for Big or occasionally Mega mobs to spawn. Encounter giants around the world!
body:
# Megamobs ### Requires the [Origins Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) ### Requires the [Pehkui Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui) for 1.19.4-1.20.4 ** ** ### Encounter big and the rare even **bigger** mobs scattered throughout the world A datapack mildly inspired by the show Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts, when wandering the world there is a chance to encounter Big mobs about twice their normal height, or rarely even Megas, which are seven times their usual size

Beware that larger mobs have increased stats like speed and health, so watch out if they're unfriendly or if your rival's dog happens to be 12 feet tall... ** ** ![A large dog stares at the camera lovingly](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab299d766b19259c844aa49c2e8b9dd6dff65451.jpeg) ** ** ![a megapig stares off into the sunrise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e808fa694bb992c148054b58a60d5b974e9cac19.jpeg) ** ** ![A spooky scary skeleton that's twice your height and has two rows of hearts stares you down, wishing you were not in creative mode.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0ed7fc1cdcaef6758a8551c2de85b94b26d7e53.jpeg) [Mellow Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/mellow) by TheCMK were used for all the screenshots!
Also please **ping** me in the Origins discord if you run into any problems or have any questions
